title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 313.660 - Off-track wagering prohibited, penalty
text:
313.660.  Off-track wagering prohibited, penalty. — 1.  No individual shall for a fee, directly or indirectly, accept anything of value to be wagered or to be transmitted or delivered for wager in any pari-mutuel system of wagering on horse racing or for a fee deliver anything of value which has been received outside of the enclosure of a race track holding a horse race licensed under sections 313.500 to 313.710 to be placed as wagers in the pari-mutuel pool within such enclosure.
  2.  Any individual violating the provisions of this section shall upon conviction be guilty of a class D felony.
(L. 1986 S.B. 572, A.L. 2014 S.B. 491) 
Effective 1-01-17
